src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for newer JDK/Spring Boot versions.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta-namespaced Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Java 17.
Replace deprecated Liquibase setter method with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated library versions.
Refactor SecurityConfiguration from extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to using @Configuration with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ deprecations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed 'extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter' and '@Override configure(HttpSecurity)' methods; added '@Configuration' and '@Bean SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http)' returning http.build().

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced '@EnableGlobalMethodSecurity(prePostEnabled = true, securedEnabled = true)' with '@EnableMethodSecurity(securedEnabled = true)'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate from authorizeRequests().antMatchers() to authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() to use the new request matcher API in Spring Security 5.7+.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda DSL and explicit token request handler required by newer Spring Security versions.
Migrate header configuration (CSP, Referrer, Permissions) to use the new lambda DSL and updated method names (e.g., permissionsPolicy instead of featurePolicy).
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport entry point with standard HttpStatusEntryPoint and use the new exceptionHandling lambda DSL.
Migrate form login configuration to use the new lambda DSL and replace custom Ajax handlers with standard HTTP status responses.
Migrate logout configuration to use the new lambda DSL and replace custom Ajax logout handler with HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler.
Migrate remember-me configuration to use the new lambda DSL.
Remove the deprecated configure(WebSecurity) method for ignoring static resources, as this is now handled via SecurityFilterChain or ignored by default in newer setups.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Deleted the 'configure(WebSecurity web)' method and its associated imports.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
